page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 192 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 192 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, providing dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high density of dedicated physical cores and memory capacity, this instance is designed for large-scale workloads requiring substantial memory footprints and predictable compute performance. The lack of hyperthreading ensures consistent execution times for memory-intensive applications, large databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and in-memory data stores. The qualitative cost profile reflects a high-density resource allocation where compute and memory are tightly coupled for enterprise-scale deployments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.48xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 192 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at 3.2 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading overhead. The instance features 1536.0 GB of RAM, providing a consistent 8.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage is not included, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance is designed for large-scale enterprise workloads, in-memory databases, and memory-intensive applications that require dedicated, predictable compute resources and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio.
